sections.content: 支付失败可能由于银行卡余额不足、网络延迟、银行系统维护或支付渠道限制导致。请先检查支付渠道并确认订单状态，参考标识符F-PAY-001。

facts.fact_text: 支付失败应先检查支付渠道和订单状态，确认是否成功扣款。

sections.heading: 支付失败的可能原因

sections.content: 如果支付时提示余额不足，建议更换银行卡或充值后重试。部分银行可能有单笔限额，请确认。
sections.heading: 银行卡余额不足导致的支付失败

sections.content: 网络波动可能导致支付请求超时，请检查网络连接后重新支付。如已扣款但订单未更新，请联系客服。
sections.heading: 网络延迟导致的支付失败

sections.content: 重复支付指同一笔订单被多次扣款，通常由于支付页面重复提交或银行处理延迟导致。请核实重复支付记录，参考标识符E-PAY-2001。
sections.heading: 重复支付的现象

sections.content: 核实重复支付后，多支付的款项将在3-5个工作日内原路退回。如需加急，可联系客服提供订单号和扣款截图。

facts.fact_text: 核实重复支付后，将退回多支付的款项至原支付账户。

sections.heading: 重复支付的退款流程

sections.content: 登录账户查看订单支付记录，对比银行账单中的扣款笔数。如不一致，提供截图给客服核实。
sections.heading: 重复支付的核实方法

sections.content: 支付处理中表示银行已收到请求但尚未返回最终结果。请等待1-2分钟后刷新页面，或查看银行扣款短信。
sections.heading: 支付处理中状态说明

sections.content: 如果支付处理中状态超过30分钟仍未更新，可能因银行系统异常导致。建议发起人工核查，客服将核实后处理。

facts.fact_text: 支付处理中超过规定时间（30分钟）需发起人工核查。

sections.heading: 支付处理中超时处理

sections.content: 通过在线客服或电话客服提供订单号，客服将联系银行核实支付状态，并在24小时内反馈结果。
sections.heading: 支付处理中发起人工核查

document.title: 支付失败与重复支付常见问题

issues: Section 'FAQ-PAY-004' (重复支付的现象) states '同一笔订单被多次扣款' but does not clarify whether this refers to *actual* multiple bank debits or *apparent* duplicates due to pending status — risks conflating 'duplicate_payment_refund' (which assumes confirmed double debit) with transient UI/backend sync issues; this creates mild ambiguity for RAG retrieval and agent routing.

Section 'FAQ-PAY-007' (支付处理中状态说明) says '银行已收到请求但尚未返回最终结果', while 'FAQ-PAY-008' correctly cites 30-minute timeout for manual escalation — however, the generation_notes require explicit acknowledgment that '支付状态与银行扣款状态可能不同步', which is only implicitly addressed (e.g., '查看银行扣款短信'). This weakens alignment with the stated design intent, though not a factual omission.

Section 'FAQ-PAY-002' and 'FAQ-PAY-003' are valid elaborations but lack required facts — acceptable per blueprint (only required_sections must contain required_facts), yet their standalone presence without anchoring to a required_fact may dilute focus; however, this does not violate structure_score as they fall under permissible supplemental sections.
review.summary: The document fully satisfies all mandatory requirements: all three required_facts are present with fact_text that precisely matches blueprint semantics (e.g., '核实重复支付后，将退回多支付的款项' aligns with '重复支付核实后退回多支付款项'); both required_identifiers F-PAY-001 and E-PAY-2001 appear contextually and correctly in sections covering '支付失败' and '重复支付'; all three required_sections ('支付失败', '重复支付', '支付处理中') are covered — though distributed across multiple subsections (e.g., '支付失败' spans FAQ-PAY-001/002/003), this is structurally permissible and enhances usability. No internal contradictions exist in time thresholds (30 min), actions (check channel → verify → escalate), or outcomes (refund timing, manual核查 trigger). Version metadata is consistent and unambiguous. Ambiguity risk is low but non-zero due to subtle conflation of 'perceived' vs 'confirmed' duplicate debit in FAQ-PAY-004 — insufficient to break RAG but warrants minor editorial tightening in next revision.
